plist.dict:
CFBundlePackageType APPL CFBundleName {{.Info.ProductName}} CFBundleExecutable {{.OutputFilename}} CFBundleIdentifier tools.kaja.Kaja CFBundleVersion {{.Info.ProductVersion}} CFBundleGetInfoString {{.Info.Comments}} CFBundleShortVersionString {{.Info.ProductVersion}} CFBundleIconFile iconfile LSMinimumSystemVersion 12.0 LSApplicationCategoryType public.app-category.developer-tools NSHighResolutionCapable true NSHumanReadableCopyright {{.Info.Copyright}} NSServices
NSMenuItem
default Run Kaja Script 1
NSMessage runScript NSPortName Kaja NSUserData 1 NSSendTypes
public.utf8-plain-text NSStringPboardType
NSMenuItem
default Run Kaja Script 2
NSMessage runScript NSPortName Kaja NSUserData 2 NSSendTypes
public.utf8-plain-text NSStringPboardType
NSMenuItem
default Run Kaja Script 3
NSMessage runScript NSPortName Kaja NSUserData 3 NSSendTypes
public.utf8-plain-text NSStringPboardType
{{if .Info.FileAssociations}} CFBundleDocumentTypes
{{range .Info.FileAssociations}}
CFBundleTypeExtensions
{{.Ext}}
CFBundleTypeName {{.Name}} CFBundleTypeRole {{.Role}} CFBundleTypeIconFile {{.IconName}}
{{end}}
{{end}} {{if .Info.Protocols}} CFBundleURLTypes
{{range .Info.Protocols}}
CFBundleURLName tools.kaja.{{.Scheme}} CFBundleURLSchemes
{{.Scheme}}
CFBundleTypeRole {{.Role}}
{{end}}
{{end}} NSAppTransportSecurity
NSAllowsLocalNetworking
